1.description: get kommunenummer and geometry for Drammen municipality

2.description: get 200-year flood zone polygons (gjentaksintervall=200) from flomareal

3.description: get buildings in Drammen (filter by kommunenummer)

4.description: find buildings that intersect the 200-year flood polygons

5.description: deduplicate to one row per building (group by bygningid)

6.description: count distinct buildings intersecting flood zones

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%drammen%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [flomsoner]
SELECT objid, gjentaksintervall, omrade FROM flomsoner_76d14d5fe2fd4a29bfffc266fdcdd820.flomareal WHERE gjentaksintervall = 200;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [matrikkelenbygning]
SELECT objid, bygningid, kommunenummer, representasjonspunkt FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning WHERE kommunenummer = '3301';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: spatial_join
-- left_source: 3
-- right_source: 2
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "representasjonspunkt"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

1.description: get Drammen municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get 200-year flood polygons (national layer, will be reduced by municipality extent)

3.description: get buildings in Drammen (filter by kommunenummer)

4.description: reduce 200-year flood polygons to Drammen extent

5.description: find buildings that intersect the reduced 200-year flood polygons

6.description: count distinct buildings intersecting flood polygons (one row per building)

7.description: aggregate to a single total count of buildings

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%drammen%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [flomsoner]
SELECT objid, gjentaksintervall, omrade FROM flomsoner_76d14d5fe2fd4a29bfffc266fdcdd820.flomareal WHERE gjentaksintervall = 200;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [matrikkelenbygning]
SELECT objid, bygningid, kommunenummer, representasjonspunkt FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning WHERE kommunenummer = '3301';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: spatial_join
-- left_source: 2
-- right_source: 1
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "omrade"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 5: spatial_join
-- left_source: 3
-- right_source: 4
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "representasjonspunkt"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 6: aggregate
-- source_step: 5
-- aggregation_type: "count"
-- group_by: ["bygningid"]
-- metric_as: "count"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 7: aggregate
-- source_step: 6
-- aggregation_type: "count"
-- metric_as: "count"
